india_trends.title: RBI clears Kotak Bank to raise stake up to 9.99% in AU Small Finance, Federal Bank
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has approved Kotak Mahindra Bank's increased stake in AU Small Finance Bank and Federal Bank. Kotak can now hold almost 9.99 percent in both lenders. This move allows Kotak to build significant minority stakes. The approvals were confirmed through regulatory filings. Market

india_trends.title: Bagmane Prime Office REIT IPO Day 3: Issue subscribed 3.48x so far. Check GMP, issue details.
india_trends.summary: Bagmane Prime Office REIT, backed by Blackstone, opened its IPO for subscription on May 5, concluding on May 7. The price band is set at ₹95-100 per unit, with a strong subscription status of 3.48x as of day 3.

india_trends.title: Tata Group, JSW to plow $1 billion in EV, battery tech
india_trends.summary: Indian giants Tata Group and JSW Group are investing close to $1 billion. They are building local capabilities in electric vehicle and battery technologies. This move aims to reduce dependence on Chinese tech. Tata's Agratas is spending over $400 million on battery research. JSW Motors plans to inve

india_trends.title: CarTrade Tech shares climb 17% to 2-month high after strong Q4 results
india_trends.summary: CarTrade Tech has seen a 17% stock surge, reaching a two-month high following strong Q4 and FY26 performance. The company reported a net profit of ₹70.85 crore, a 54% YoY increase, and achieved its highest annual revenue of ₹870 crore, reflecting robust growth.

india_trends.title: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO listing in focus. Here's what GMP signals ahead of debut
india_trends.summary: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO, which raised ₹900 crore, will debut on 8 May after strong demand with 9.5 times overall subscription. The issue included a fresh equity offering of ₹850 crore and an offer-for-sale of ₹76 crore. Grey market premium indicates a strong listing price expectation.

india_trends.title: Awfis strengthens presence with 28 centres in Chennai across 8.75 lakh sq ft
india_trends.summary: Awfis has expanded its presence in Chennai by leasing over 110,000 square feet for two new centres. This move increases Awfis' total footprint in the city to 875,000 square feet across 28 locations. The flexible office sector in Chennai is experiencing significant growth, driven by enterprise adopti

india_trends.title: KKR-backed InCred Holdings files updated IPO papers; valuation may touch ₹15,000 crore
india_trends.summary: InCred Holdings's offering comprises a fresh issue of equity shares totalling ₹1,250 crore and an offer for sale of up to 99 million shares from existing investors, per draft IPO papers.

india_trends.title: India's power demand to rise by 5 to 5.5 percent in FY27: ICRA
india_trends.summary: India's power demand is set for a significant rise of 5.0-5.5 percent in 2026-27. This growth will be fueled by industrial, commercial, agricultural, and household sectors. Emerging sources like electric vehicles and data centers will also contribute. Thermal plant utilization will stay steady. Dist

india_trends.title: Coal India shares fall 3% after report says govt likely to sell Rs 10,000-crore stake via OFS
india_trends.summary: Coal India shares fell on Thursday following a report about a potential government stake sale. The government may sell 3-4% of the company for approximately Rs 10,000 crore. This move could offer shares at a discount to the current market price. The company's recent financial results showed a profit

india_trends.title: Can gold prices outperform silver amid weak global macroeconomic outlook?
india_trends.summary: Gold is likely to outperform silver in the near term as weakening global economic conditions and geopolitical uncertainties continue to drive investors toward safe-haven assets, analysts said.

india_trends.title: Rising packaging bag costs major headwind for UltraTech Cement: Official
india_trends.summary: UltraTech Cement is navigating rising costs for plastic packaging and fuel. These expenses are a concern for the company's target of double-digit volume growth in FY27. Despite these challenges, UltraTech is investing in capacity expansion and expects sustainable growth in the cement industry. Stron

india_trends.title: RBI clears Kotak Mahindra Bank to buy up to 9.99% in Federal Bank
india_trends.summary: The Reserve Bank of India has approved Kotak Mahindra Bank to acquire up to 9.99% of Federal Bank's share capital. This move positions Kotak Mahindra Bank as a potentially significant institutional shareholder in the Kerala-based lender. Investors will now monitor future disclosures to track the pro

india_trends.title: Vodafone Idea, YES Bank, GTL Infrastructure, HFCL, Meesho among the most traded stocks today, 7 May 2026
india_trends.summary: Vodafone Idea, YES Bank, GTL Infrastructure, HFCL, Meesho, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), Filatex Fashions, Tata Silver Exchange Traded Fund, and Suzlon Energy were among the most traded stocks on the NSE.
